commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a ClickClack inbound access resolver, gates gateway dispatch on sender allowlist decisions, derives CommandAuthorized from that decision, and adds focused gateway/inbound regression tests.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes from source inspection: current main dispatches non-bot ClickClack messages directly and sets CommandAuthorized true while allowFrom already exists in config; I did not run a live ClickClack gateway.
